pkgmetadata.longdescription: This package contains \"the\" reference YAML syntax parser ("Text.Yaml.Reference"), generated directly from the YAML specifications, as well as sample program (@yaml2yeast@) that allows accessing it from the command line, converting YAML files to YEAST tokens. This is intended to be more of an \"executable specification\" for YAML rather than an actual basis for YAML tool chains. That said, it is possible to build interesting tools on top of it, such as the @yeast2html@ YAML syntax visualizer (contained in this package), pretty printers, etc. This is a streaming parser that will \"immediately\" begin to generate output, but it has a memoy leak (actually, retention) problem that prevents it from being applied to \"large\" files. To debug this with minimal syntax productions use @yes "#" | yaml2yeast -p debug-leak@.
